mapper.select: SELECT CVUR.USER_ID ,CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM ,'Y' AS ID_CHECK ,CVUR.COMPANY_CD ,CUST.CUST_NM AS COMPANY_NM ,CVUR.DEPT_CD ,CVUR.DEPT_NM ,CVUR.PARENT_DEPT_CD ,CVUR.PARENT_DEPT_NM ,CVUR.PARENT_DEPT_CD ' / ' CVUR.PARENT_DEPT_NM AS PARENT_DEPT_INFO ,CVUR.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM ,CVUR.CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM ,CVUR.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM ,CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL ,CVUR.POSITION_NM ,CVUR.SMS_FLAG ,CVUR.MAIL_FLAG ,CVUR.DUTY_NM ,CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID ,getUserName(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CHIEF_USER_NM ,CVUR.ONES_DUTY_NM ,CVUR.REG_USER_ID ,CVUR.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD ,CVUR.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD_CHECK ,CUST.RELAT_YN FROM STOCCVUR CVUR LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCOGDP OGDP ON (OGDP.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND OGDP.BUYER_CD = CVUR.COMPANY_CD AND OGDP.DEPT_CD = CVUR.DEPT_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{USER_ID}

SELECT CP.CTRL_CD ,(SELECT CO.CTRL_NM FROM STOCBACO CO WHERE CO.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CO.BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd} AND CO.CTRL_CD = CP.CTRL_CD AND CO.COMPANY_TYPE = 'B' AND CO.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CTRL_NM ,CP.USE_FLAG ,(CP.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE ,CP.REG_USER_ID ,getUserName(CP.GATE_CD, CP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCBACP CP WHERE CP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CP.CTRL_USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND CP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY CP.CTRL_CD

SELECT DISTINCT CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID ,CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM ,(OGDP.DEPT_CD, CVUR.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_C ,OGDP.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM ,'1' AS EMP_STSC ,CVUR.TEL_NUM AS DWIN_TEL ,OGDP.TEL_NUM AS REP_TEL ,CVUR.CELL_NUM AS HP_NO ,CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL ,NVL(CVUR.ROLE_TEXT, CVUR.ONES_DUTY_NM) AS CHRG_BSN_NM ,CVUR.ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL AS DTI_CHRG_BSN_NM ,CVUR.DUTY_NM AS OFT_NM ,CVUR.POSITION_NM AS PZC_NM ,CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,CUST.CORP_TYPE AS NH_CORP_CODE ,(CASE WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '1' THEN '02' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '2' THEN '03' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '3' THEN '04' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '5' THEN '06' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'A' THEN '08' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'B' THEN '09' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'C' THEN '10' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'D' THEN '11' ELSE '' END) AS NC_COMP_DS_C ,'NHEPRO' AS AGENT_ID ,SYSDATE AS FSRGDTM ,#{ses.userId} AS FSRGID ,SYSDATE AS LSCHGDTM ,#{ses.userId} AS LSCHGID FROM STOCCVUR CVUR LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCOGDP OGDP ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = OGDP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = OGDP.BUYER_CD AND CVUR.DEPT_CD = OGDP.DEPT_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = UPPER(SF_TRIM(#{USER_ID})) AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT (CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID}) ) A
